---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
execute:
  cache: true
jupyter: python3
listing:
  - id: featured
    contents:
      - "posts/**/index.qmd"
      - "snapmda/**/index.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, categories]
    include:
      categories: [Featured]
  - id: listing
    contents: 
      - "posts/**/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [date, title, reading-time]
    exclude:
      categories: [Featured]
---

```{=html}
<style>
#featured {
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

#notes-listing {
  border-left: 2px solid #95a5a6;
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
}

#notes-listing .quarto-listing-default .listing-item {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

h2 {
  color: #2c3e50;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
</style>
```


## Featured

::: {#featured}
:::

## Posts

::: {#listing}
:::
